accepted_tasks.reason: All three are in the same function area of lnd.ts. The void reject is a real production bug (promise never rejects on error). Dead vars merged in since a worker fixing the bug will be in the same code.

Verified: line 574 throws `new Error('No active keyset...')` while the adjacent getKeysetForProof uses KeysetNotFoundError. Plain Error escapes instanceof CashuError handler, causing unstructured 500.
Verified: `this.keysets.get(output.id)!` at line 634. If keyset missing (e.g., future refactor skips validateOutput), throws unhandled TypeError instead of typed CashuError.
Verified: function exists, exported, but no call sites found in codebase. Superseded by getProofStatesByY().
Both are no-op patterns on the witness field. Merged into one cleanup task. Quick find-and-replace.
